elevation.$description: Neumorphic dual-shadow scale per ADR 0007. Use single flat shadow for prefers-contrast: more.

sm.$description: Subtle raised; small cards, chips, pressed buttons

1.$description: Neumorphic subtle raised; small cards, chips (ADR-0007)

2.$description: Neumorphic raised; cards, panels standard elevation (ADR-0007)

3.$description: Neumorphic pressed/inset; active buttons, input fields (ADR-0007)
